title: Upload document
description: Upload a PDF, DOCX, EPUB, or public article URL through a clear eight-step flow.
selectHint: or select one from your computer
fileLimit: PDF, DOCX, or EPUB up to {size} MB

source.title: Choose a file or URL
source.urlHint: Enter a public HTTP or HTTPS URL only. Internal pages and private-network addresses are rejected.

trust.privacy: Only you can access documents in your account.

info.title: Review source information
info.safety: NexaRead checks file type, size limits, and ownership before a document enters processing.

type.title: Choose a document type
type.description: Let NexaRead detect the type or choose one to apply an appropriate reading layout from the start.
type.label: Document type

collection.title: Choose a collection
collection.description: This step is optional. You can reorganize the document later in the library.
collection.label: Collection
collection.unavailable: Collections could not be loaded. You can continue and organize the document later.

processing.title: NexaRead is processing your document
processing.description: The file is stored in your private library. Extraction, layout, and indexing are running.
processing.safeToLeave: You can leave this page; processing status remains available from your dashboard and library.

ocr.title: This scan needs OCR
ocr.description: NexaRead could not extract enough text from this file. The original remains available for review.
ocr.step1: Open the original and confirm that it is a scanned or image-only PDF.
ocr.step2: Run OCR with a tool you trust to create a PDF with a text layer.
ocr.step3: Upload the text-layer file; you do not need to delete the original first.

failed.title: Processing could not finish
failed.description: Check the format, try another copy, or open the original to confirm its contents.

ready.title: Your document is ready
ready.description: “{title}” has been processed and is ready in the reader.

validation.type: Choose a PDF, DOCX, or EPUB file.
validation.size: The document must be {size} MB or smaller.
validation.required: Choose a PDF, DOCX, or EPUB file before continuing.
validation.url: Enter a valid public HTTP or HTTPS URL.
validation.guidance: Check the source, format, and size, then try again. If the error continues, keep this message for troubleshooting.
